narrative:
Precinct Ironton 4G (precinct in Lawrence County) has 343 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
